Error.PluginSystemLevelInstallForbidden: Plugin {{name}} is system-level and cannot be installed from this API
Error.PluginSystemLevelDefaultTenantRequired: System-level plugin {{name}} can only be installed from the Default tenant
Error.PluginTenantLevelInstallForbidden: Tenant-level plugin {{name}} can only be installed by a Super Admin in the current tenant
Error.PluginTenantLevelAlreadyOwned: Tenant-level plugin {{name}} already belongs to tenant {{tenantId}} and cannot be installed in another tenant
Error.PluginProcessLevelConflict: Plugin {{name}} is already registered at level {{existingLevel}}. Uninstall that registration and restart the API before installing it at level {{requestedLevel}}
Error.PluginSystemUninstallForbidden: Plugin {{name}} is a system plugin and cannot be uninstalled

Errors.QueryParameters: This view does not support query parameters

Errors.Cursor: This view does not support cursor queries
